series_metadata.series_description: Grant program which awards funding to technical assistance projects, training, scholarships, research assistance and support services to small urban and rural transit systems. Grant criteria, applications, contracts, invoices and correspondence pertaining to projects are submitted under the Rural Transit Assistance Program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper until scanned into electronic format then destroy paper. ; Electronic: Retain on digital media for 5 years after grant closeout., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
